reviews.review_description: Great to see such experiences brought to life in VR. ShivLok offers a serene atmosphere, though clearer guidance and more interaction in the rituals would make it even more engaging. A promising and heartfelt beginning - excited to see where it goes next.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much. We promise to improve our gameplay with each update.

reviews.review_description: Pretty short experience overall. Doesn’t really make sense as a Quest store app.. this would’ve worked better as a VRChat world, with way more people actually checking it out

developer_response.body: We are still on the developing side of this. We encountered the same issues and we will try our very best to give our users a better experience with each new update.

reviews.review_description: Very good. A virtual teaching in Shaivism. Started here for a blessing then moved to Guided Meditation VR to complete 🙂

reviews.review_title: Beautiful, but could not get it to work
reviews.review_description: I was stuck in the water and could never get to the steps 🙁

developer_response.body: We are really sorry for the issue caused we are looking into it. Try resetting your boundary before opening the app might fix this issue for now.
